interactive_tasks.task_uz: 2030-yilda ta'lim tizimini to'liq raqamlashtirish tasavvur qiling. Qanday texnologiyalar ishlatiladi, o'qituvchilar roli qanday o'zgaradi va tengsizlik muammosi qanday hal qilinadi?

interactive_tasks.task_en: Imagine fully digitalising the education system by 2030. What technologies are used, how will teachers' roles change, and how will inequality be addressed?
